steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The fellowship was "created to ______ exceptional folk and traditional artists" and Ramon Soto was "chosen for his lifetime contributions to the arts." The blank must express recognizing or celebrating those artists.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean showing respect and recognition to artists. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — begin: "created to begin exceptional folk and traditional artists" — begin means to start something. A fellowship doesn't start artists; it recognizes them. ✗
  • Choice B — overshadow: "created to overshadow exceptional folk and traditional artists" — overshadow means to make less significant. A fellowship awards distinction, not diminishment. ✗
  • Choice C — distract: "created to distract exceptional folk and traditional artists" — distract means to draw attention away. This is the opposite of focusing recognition on artists. ✗
  • Choice D — honor: "created to honor exceptional folk and traditional artists" — honor means to show respect and recognition, directly matching a fellowship awarded for lifetime contributions. ✓
That is the correct answer.
